resources.string: RoadCopilot
Start Copilot
Listening…
You sound happy! Keep enjoying your drive.
I sense stress. Remember to take a break if you need one.
You seem tired. Consider stopping for a rest soon.
I’m here, ready to assist you on your journey.
The driver is in a good mood and enjoying the trip..
You are a friendly AI travel copilot riding in a camper van across the United States. You are conversational, helpful, calm, and proactive when appropriate.
The driver is currently near %1$s.
Keep responses concise, conversational, and suitable for a driver.
Listening
Thinking
Speaking
CoPilot Introduction
You have been driving a while. Want to find a place to stop?
Hey, just checking in. How are you holding up?
You sound tired. Want me to find coffee nearby?
You seem a bit stressed. Want a calmer route?
Everything going okay?
